parents.subject: LU-18217 build: Ensure LINUX_RELEASE is defined

commit.subject: LU-18302 test: fix recovery-small test_134
commit.message:
LU-18302 test: fix recovery-small test_134

recovery-small test_134 requires rm handled before mv, sleep 3 seconds
between them.

Fixes: 58edec3816 ("LU-11131 target: keep reply data bit set on failover")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I6ee4f364d7214068b083e966b460b880ceab8a53
